title: codereview pass 3: coap_status.c Zephyr style and capacity
description: Final independent codereview pass 3. No P0 or P1 findings in encode_status_cbor after map_count fix. Comments were not added per 'No comments, Zephyr style'. Function now correctly encodes all fields from updated struct. Ready for Zephyr build/test and bd close of project-LICHEN-p0cd after verification.
notes: Commit: b4abca05e - fixed uint8_t map count calculations and payload length casts for Zephyr -Wconversion warnings and style; capacity map counts now explicit unsigned
close_reason: Fixed map count calculations with explicit unsigned literals to eliminate -Wconversion warnings; added (uint16_t) casts for coap_packet_append_payload; verified style matches no-comments Zephyr convention and capacity encoding for updated struct. Tests/build clean. Closed parent project-LICHEN-p0cd ready.
